prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约210→234→205→152名，整体呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约82名；2025年基准约152名，处于历史最好水平；本省理科组计划2022年15人、2023年13人、2024年13人、2025年12人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划仅8人，较2025年缩招33.3%，缩招幅度显著，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第12名（共享哈尔滨工业大学排名），近年排名持续上升，属顶尖工科院校；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A等，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（计算机与电子通信、机器人与智能装备等）为当前高热专业方向；本省2026年考生总数约6.6万，与2025年基本持平，竞争压力未明显变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年大幅缩招33.3%导致竞争加剧、学校顶尖工科实力与高抖音热度持续吸引优质生源，在2025年基准152名基础上预计位次进一步前移；预测最低位次约107名，区间57–157名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（57–157名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如57名以内）可重点冲一档王牌专业（计算机与电子通信）；位次接近区间上限（157名左右）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 210 → 234 → 205 → 152, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing rank numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 82 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 152, the best historical level; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 15 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a gradual annual reduction; the 2026 plan is only 8, a 33.3% reduction from 2025, a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (sharing the ranking with Harbin Institute of Technology), with a continuously rising ranking in recent years, belonging to top-tier engineering institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering experimental classes (Computer and Electronic Communication, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment, etc.) are currently high-heat major directions; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 66,000, basically the same as in 2025, with no significant change in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant 33.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 leading to intensified competition, and the school's top-tier engineering strength and high Douyin popularity continuing to attract high-quality students, based on the 2025 baseline of 152, the ranking is expected to move further forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 107, with a range of 57–157.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Automation and Electrical Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellent Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (57–157), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 57), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer and Electronic Communication); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 157), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 256 → 120 → 321, showing extreme fluctuations. In 2024, due to an extremely small enrollment (2 students), the ranking abnormally moved forward, and in 2025 it returned to 321. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 321. The provincial liberal arts group plan was 2 students in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6 students, a 20% increase from 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top-tier university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. Douyin popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), indicating overall high attention for application. The Economics and Management Pilot Class corresponds to Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., with strong academic strength, but the liberal arts group only has this one enrollment major.

专业热度与地域.text: The Economics and Management Pilot Class (Accounting/Digital Economy) has a divided and cautious social popularity, with the overall popularity of finance and economics majors cooling compared to previous years. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the extreme fluctuations in historical rankings, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, only one enrollment major, and the divided popularity of finance and economics majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 321, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 375, with a range of 325–425.
